chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hamdan Ibn Al-Husayn

text: و ما كان فيه عن حمدان بن الحسين فقد رويته عن عليّ بن حاتم إجازة قال: أخبرنا القاسم بن محمّد قال: حدّثنا حمدان بن الحسين‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Hamdan ibn Al-Husayn, I have narrated it from Ali ibn Hatim by authorization, who said: Al-Qasim ibn Muhammad informed us, who said: Hamdan ibn Al-Husayn narrated to us.
